Class ResearcherDecorator

java.lang.Object
models.User
research.ResearcherDecorator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ConcreteResearcher
public abstract class ResearcherDecorator extends User

  • Method Details

    • getRole

      public String getRole()
      Description copied from class: User
      Returns the role label for this user (e.g. "STUDENT", "TEACHER"). Subclasses must provide a concrete implementation.
      Specified by:
      getRole in class User
      Returns:
      non-null role string identifying the user's type
